description.de: Beschreibung für Polpala folgt — siehe Wikipedia-Artikel.
description.en: Ouret lanata, the mountain knotgrass, is a woody, prostrate or succulent, perennial herb in the family Amaranthaceae, native to the tropics of Africa and Asia. It has been included as occurring in Australia by the US government, but it is not recognised as occurring in Australia by any Australian state herbarium or Plants of the World Online. The plant sometimes flowers in the first year.

description.de: Polpala wird traditionell als Aufguss als Tee bei Harnwegsbeschwerden verwendet. Pflanze aus der Familie der Fuchsschwanzgewächse — typische Verwendung in der europäischen Volksheilkunde bzw. Küche.
description.en: This plant is used for food for people and animals. The whole plant, especially the leaves, is edible. The leaves are put into soup or eaten as a spinach or as a vegetable. The plant provides grazing for stock, game and chickens. The plant is used as a traditional medicine for snakebites. The plant is also used as a talisman against evil spirits, a good-luck talisman for hunters, and a talisman for the well-being of widows.

warnings.de: In der ayurvedischen Tradition für Nieren/Harnwege verwendet. Bei Nierenerkrankungen Arzt befragen.
warnings.en: Used in Ayurvedic tradition for kidney/urinary tract. Consult physician in case of kidney conditions.

de: Nicht überdüngen — wächst auch auf armen Böden.
Blätter und Kraut für Tee verwenden.
en: Don't over-fertilise — grows even on poor soils.
Use leaves and herb for tea.
